examples: If we are, I'm going to sit with Flossie - can't I?
The voice was the same, but Flossie was a man. His face was hidden by a mask.
"But I want a drink," insisted Flossie, a bit fretfully, for she was tired from the long journey.
Missy proposed that she would allow Flossie to continue to visit Howard as she wanted.
He got a housekeeper, Flossie, recommended by the manager of his building.
